questions.text: Does {{storeName}} have a KOMPASS cart?

branches.text: Does {{storeName}} put new items on the Kompass cart?
Does {{storeName}} have an area for storing KOMPASS supplies, data skins, pushers, and reset materials?

questions.text: Where at {{storeName}} is the cart or designated area located (if there is one)?
questions.placeholder: Describe the location in enough detail that someone new could find it
examples: In the back room, between Grocery Receiving and Home Side Receiving there is a door where you can turn left or right, turn right, and at the end of the HABA/HBC rows of u-boats, on the right hand side, you'll see the green Kompass cart with a white label on it.
questions.examplesLabel: Example of the detail we need

questions.text: Does {{storeName}} have a KOMPASS Champion or reset captain?

branches.text: Do they keep the KOMPASS cart or area organized?
